name: Baked Rice
recipeIngredient: Tabasco or other hot pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a pan. Add the onion, garlic, and bell pepper and cook until vegetables are soft.
2. Add the remaining ingredients, but half of the grated parmesan.
3. Place everything in a baking dish. Sprinkle plenty of parmesan on top, drizzle a little olive oil, and bake until heated through.
